title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Siemens India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Siemens India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Siemens India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Siemens India Global Group:
Siemens India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Global Group!
